post.description: Verifies the authenticity and validity of a Verifiable Presentation (SD-JWT VC, W3C VCDM, or mDOC) and returns parsed credential data

requestBody.description: VP verification request. Format is automatically detected (SD-JWT VC, W3C VCDM JSON-LD, or mDOC).

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid VP format or missing required fields

422.description: Unprocessable Entity - VP is valid but doesn't meet business requirements

post.description: Verifies ES256 X.509 certificates for Trust Registry compliance. Validates signature, expiry, self-signed status, and ES256 algorithm compatibility according to IATA interoperability profile.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid certificate format or missing required fields

post.description: Decodes a VC or VP token without verification, showing structure, headers, payloads, and selective disclosures for debugging purposes

vp.summary: Decode VP token with Key Binding

post.description: Create a debug VCDM VC for testing purposes
Create a debug VCDM VP for testing purposes

requestBody.description: W3C VC to wrap in VP

basic.summary: Basic W3C VC example and transaction ID

200.description: Debug VCDM VP created successfully into base64url

get.description: Returns a status list for credential revocation/suspension checking according to the Status List 2021 specification

put.description: Toggles the revocation status of a credential in the status list

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: The index of the credential in the status list

get.description: Returns debug information about the status list
return the did document of did:web:iata-poc.dev.hopae.app
Returns metadata for a specific verifiable credential type including schema and supported algorithms
Returns the Trust List JADES Token

info.title: VP Verification API
info.description: API for verifying Verifiable Presentations (VP) supporting SD-JWT VC, W3C VCDM (JSON-LD), and mDOC formats

vp.description: The Verifiable Presentation to verify. Format is automatically detected based on content structure (SD-JWT VC, W3C VCDM, or mDOC).

sdJwtVc.summary: IATA SD-JWT VP with Key Binding JWT (Check-in Credential)

verified.description: Whether the VP was successfully verified

format.description: Auto-detected or validated format of the VP

message.example: The provided VP format is not recognized or is malformed

verified.description: Whether the VP was successfully verified

certificate.description: PEM formatted X.509 certificate to verify (ES256/ECDSA only)

signature_valid.description: Whether the certificate signature is valid

not_expired.description: Whether the certificate is within validity period

self_signed.description: Whether the certificate is self-signed (issuer === subject)

key_usage_valid.description: Whether the certificate has required key usage (digitalSignature)

algorithm_supported.description: Whether the certificate uses supported algorithm (ES256 only)

token.description: The token to decode (VC or VP)

tokenType.description: Token type (vc or vp). If not specified, will be auto-detected.

hasKbJwt.description: Whether the token has a key binding JWT

description.example: A Verifiable Credential for travel agency employees

vct.description: VCT identifier (schema identifier, not API endpoint)

description.example: A Verifiable Credential for travel agency employees
